info.title: PawPayments API
info.description:
Public REST API for the PawPayments crypto payment gateway.

All `/api/v2/*` endpoints require an `x-api-key` header issued in the merchant dashboard. Responses are wrapped in `{"ok": true, "result": ...}` on success and `{"ok": false, "error": {code, message, details?}}` on failure.

get.description: Returns every supported coin/token along with its chain, network family and the current global minimum invoice amount.

get.summary: Get current exchange rates from cache

parameters.name: base

schema.description: Fiat base for rates. Must be one of the supported fiats.
schema.title: Base

parameters.description: Fiat base for rates. Must be one of the supported fiats.

parameters.name: assets

schema.description: Comma-separated list of asset keys to filter, e.g. `btc,usdt_tron`.
schema.title: Assets

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of asset keys to filter, e.g. `btc,usdt_tron`.

get.summary: Get the merchant's balance summary in USD

get.description: Returns a paginated, filterable list of invoices for the authenticated merchant. Supports filtering by status, asset, date range and a list of explicit ids via `order_ids`.

post.description: Creates a new invoice. If `asset` is omitted, the customer picks the currency on the hosted checkout (the deposit address is allocated only after the choice is made).

post.summary: Resend the merchant webhook for this invoice

post.description: Requires the request IP to be whitelisted for the merchant. The `x-uniq-id` header (UUIDv4) is mandatory and provides idempotency for 2 hours.

post.summary: Create a batch of up to 200 payouts. Per-item failures are reported individually

get.description: When `type` is omitted, all three streams are merged in time order.

parameters.name: type

schema.description: Filter to a single entry type. If omitted, all types are merged in time order.
schema.title: Type

parameters.description: Filter to a single entry type. If omitted, all types are merged in time order.

post.summary: Send a test webhook to either `url` from the body or the merchant's callback URL

post.description: Returns the existing active address for `(user_id, family)` or creates a new one. One EVM address covers all EVM chains.

delete.description: Marks the address inactive and unsubscribes it from on-chain notifications.

get.summary: Get a permanent address by id

billing_type.description: Invoice settlement mode. `STATIC` — fixed-price service purchase: the invoice expects exactly `amount`. An underpayment moves it to `partially_paid` (NOT finalized) so the client can top up to the full amount; the address keeps listening until the invoice expires or reaches `success`/`paid_over`. `VARY` — open-ended balance top-up: any incoming payment finalises the invoice (`success` if it covers `amount`, `partially_paid` (finalized) if less). Required value when `permanent_address=true`.
billing_type.title: Billing Type

permanent_address.description: If true, bind this invoice to the permanent deposit address for (merchant, user_id, asset family). The address is created on first use and reused thereafter. Requires `billing_type=VARY` and a non-empty `user_id`. If `asset` is provided the address is allocated immediately; if omitted, the address is allocated when the customer selects a currency on the hosted checkout. XMR is not supported for permanent addresses.
permanent_address.title: Permanent Address

UniqIdHeaders.69a061c.description:
Idempotency header for write endpoints (payouts).

The `x-uniq-id` value must be a fresh UUIDv4. The same value is rejected
for 2 hours after first use.
UniqIdHeaders.69a061c.title: UniqIdHeaders

base.description: Fiat base for rates. Must be one of the supported fiats.
base.title: Base

assets.description: Comma-separated list of asset keys to filter, e.g. `btc,usdt_tron`.
assets.title: Assets

type.description: Filter to a single entry type. If omitted, all types are merged in time order.
type.title: Type

TestWebhookBody.1a0169e.description: Optional override for the destination URL of the test webhook.

url.description: Override target URL. If omitted, uses the merchant's configured callback URL.
url.title: Url

TestWebhookBody.1a0169e.title: TestWebhookBody

asset.description: Asset ticker (e.g. `usdt_trc20`). Used to infer `family` when `family` is omitted.
asset.title: Asset

status.description: One of: created, confirming, partially_paid, paid_over, success, failed, high_risk, expired, cancelled, refunded. Terminal-expiry split: `cancelled` is reachable only from `partially_paid` + `billing_type=STATIC` (merchant was already credited the partial amount at AML time; the credit is kept on expiry — `cancelled` reports the final under-paid state without reversal). Everything else still in `created` at TTL (including the sub-$2 tiny-payment deferral path that stored `received_amount` without enqueueing AML) → `expired`. `partially_paid` + `billing_type=VARY` is terminal at AML time and never transitions on TTL.
status.title: Status

initial_asset.description: Asset originally requested at invoice creation. Immutable after first assignment — if the customer changes the payment currency on the hosted checkout, `asset` reflects the new choice while `initial_asset` keeps the original one.
initial_asset.title: Initial Asset

initial_amount.description: Snapshot of the originally requested crypto amount (immutable; equals `amount`).
initial_amount.title: Initial Amount

fiat_amount.description: Cumulative amount paid in `fiat_currency`. Updated on each on-chain payment.
fiat_amount.title: Fiat Amount

initial_fiat_amount.description: Originally requested amount in `fiat_currency` (immutable; useful when `fiat_amount` becomes a partial sum).
initial_fiat_amount.title: Initial Fiat Amount

billing_type.description: Settlement mode: `STATIC` (fixed-price service — `partially_paid` keeps the invoice open for top-ups until `success`/`paid_over`/`expires_at`) or `VARY` (any incoming payment finalises the invoice — used for balance top-ups and for invoices bound to permanent addresses).
billing_type.title: Billing Type

address_from.description: Sender address of the (last) on-chain payment, when known.
address_from.title: Address From

expires_at.description: Unix timestamp when the invoice stops accepting new deposits.
expires_at.title: Expires At

original_amount.description: Set only when price_modifier was applied.
original_amount.title: Original Amount

permanent_address_id.description: Set only on deposit invoices auto-created from a permanent address.
permanent_address_id.title: Permanent Address Id

user_id.description: Set only on deposit invoices auto-created from a permanent address (copied from the address).
user_id.title: User Id

received_amount.description: Cumulative crypto amount actually received on-chain.
received_amount.title: Received Amount

txid.description: Hash of the (last) transaction that contributed to this invoice. Set after a successful on-chain payment.
txid.title: Txid

processed_at.description: Unix timestamp when the invoice transitioned to a paid status (success / partially_paid / paid_over).
processed_at.title: Processed At

details.description: Optional context. For VALIDATION_ERROR contains a list of {field, message}.
details.title: Details

status.description: One of: created, confirming, partially_paid, paid_over, success, failed, high_risk, expired, cancelled, refunded. Terminal-expiry split: `cancelled` is reachable only from `partially_paid` + `billing_type=STATIC` (merchant was already credited the partial amount at AML time; the credit is kept on expiry — `cancelled` reports the final under-paid state without reversal). Everything else still in `created` at TTL (including the sub-$2 tiny-payment deferral path that stored `received_amount` without enqueueing AML) → `expired`. `partially_paid` + `billing_type=VARY` is terminal at AML time and never transitions on TTL.
status.title: Status

received_amount.title: Received Amount

txid.title: Txid

processed_at.description: Unix timestamp when the invoice transitioned to a paid status (success / partially_paid / paid_over).
processed_at.title: Processed At

status.description: One of: first_payout_review, pending, processing, success, failed, cancelled.
status.title: Status

fiat_amount_usd.description: USD-equivalent of `amount` at payout creation time, before withdrawal and energy fees.
fiat_amount_usd.title: Fiat Amount Usd

debit_usd.description: Total USD deducted from merchant balance.
debit_usd.title: Debit Usd

fee.description: Network fee in the asset's units.
fee.title: Fee

energy_fee_usd.description: Tron energy surcharge in USD (0 outside Tron).
energy_fee_usd.title: Energy Fee Usd

txid.description: Single tx hash for non-batch payouts. Set after broadcast.
txid.title: Txid

tx_hashes.description: Multiple tx hashes for EVM batch payouts (one per chunk).
tx_hashes.title: Tx Hashes

processed_at.description: Unix timestamp when status flipped from `pending`/`processing`.
processed_at.title: Processed At

voided.description: True if the payout was voided by an operator and is no longer counted toward the balance.
voided.title: Voided
